name: Bert Lown
abstract: Bert Lown (born Albert Charles Lown; June 6, 1903 – November 20, 1962) was an American violinist, orchestra leader, and songwriter.

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Jerome
about_quotes.evidence: Because you know coming out of the twenties you heard Paul Whiteman, Bert Lown, and even Casa Loma
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Jerome interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996
